name: Cheese Sticks
recipeIngredient: Extra sharp Cheddar cheese, grated (2 cups, 8 ounces)
Butter or margarine, softened (1/2 cup, 1 stick)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the cheese and butter until blended.
2. In a separate bowl, stir together the flour, salt, and cayenne pepper.
3. Add the flour mixture to the cheese mixture; stir to blend or use hands to work in the flour.
4. Cover the dough and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Grease a large baking sheet.
7. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured board or pastry cloth.
8. Gently knead the dough until smooth.
9. Roll out the dough very thin, about 1/8-inch thick.
10. Cut into 4 x 1/2-inch sticks using a sharp knife or pastry wheel.
11. Place the sticks on the prepared baking sheet.
12. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool on a wire rack.
